mapper.sql: progress_id, user_id, roadmap_id, current_node_id, completed_nodes, progress_percent, status, started_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roadmap_progress ( user_id, roadmap_id, current_node_id, completed_nodes, progress_percent, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{roadmapId}, #{currentNodeId}, #{completedNodes}, #{progressPercent}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_roadmap_progress SET current_node_id = #{currentNodeId}, completed_nodes = #{completedNodes}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, status = #{status} WHERE progress_id = #{progressId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roadmap_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND roadmap_id = #{roadmapId}
